phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 5/10 changes DONE. C-003 (seed-once) landed: seed_config_store runs before the overlay in run_daemon (seed → overlay → connect); content-hash + provenance merge, never mtime; only BOSSFANG_CONFIG_BOOTSTRAP_REVISION bump can override a runtime row. Boot pipeline now persists bootstrap into the store and never clobbers UI edits. Next C-006 (reload reads store) -> C-007 (determinism test) -> C-005b (provider/config_set + HTTP route tests) -> C-008 (prod import) -> C-009 (K8s ConfigMap revert, hard-gated on C-008).

next_action.description: Reload path re-runs the API-layer seed+overlay so POST /api/config/reload re-resolves effective_mcp_servers from the store — M, depends on C-004
